findings.title: Deprecated sample text helper remains in production extractor
findings.description: A deprecated test helper lives in the production extractor and returns sample report text. This increases the risk of accidental test behavior in production.
findings.snippet:
async def _get_sample_transunion_text(self) -> str:
    logger.warning("Using sample text for testing purposes only")
findings.recommendation: Move the sample text helper into test utilities or guard it behind explicit test-only flags.
findings.impact: Potential degradation of reliability or security posture if left unaddressed.
